purpose: Generated-output proof for Wave70 mf70_eyebrows mask routing using the active MOD-17 Canny v3 portrait as source.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: extremely subtle photoreal eyebrow texture preservation pass, preserve exact person identity, neutral expression, gaze direction, eyebrow shape, brow thickness, brow color, forehead skin texture, eye shape, eyelid fold placement, eyelashes, iris color, pupil size, sclera tone, catchlights, hairline, nearby hair occlusion, face lighting, white blazer, background, and portrait composition unchanged
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: identity change, different person, expression change, angry brows, surprised brows, arched brows, thick eyebrows, thin eyebrows, missing eyebrows, mismatched eyebrows, eyebrow color change, makeup change, forehead mutation, hairline mutation, gaze change, mismatched eyes, crossed eyes, eyelid deformation, eyelash mutation, iris color change, glassy eyes, sclera discoloration, catchlight change, skin tone change, visible seam, hair mutation, clothing change, background change, watermark, text

qa_focus: eyebrow shape, color, and symmetry remain natural
no expression drift through brow reshaping
gaze, pupil, iris, sclera, and catchlights remain stable
forehead and hairline do not mutate
no visible seam around eyebrow masks

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Use the Wave70 eyebrow mask with low denoise to prove local generated-output routing while minimizing expression, brow-shape, forehead, eye, hairline, and identity drift.
